# Quillship

> A fictional headless CMS — defective docs used as a Writing Day sandbox.

## Docs

- [Home](https://wtd-quillship-demo.github.io/quillship-docs/docs/): Overview and landing page
- [Getting Started](https://wtd-quillship-demo.github.io/quillship-docs/docs/getting-started.html): Install Quillship and create your first content type
- [Authentication](https://wtd-quillship-demo.github.io/quillship-docs/docs/authentication.html): API keys, OAuth, and token management
- [API Reference](https://wtd-quillship-demo.github.io/quillship-docs/docs/api-reference.html): REST endpoints and request/response schemas
- [GraphQL API](https://wtd-quillship-demo.github.io/quillship-docs/docs/api/graphql.html): GraphQL schema, queries, and mutations
- [Rate Limits](https://wtd-quillship-demo.github.io/quillship-docs/docs/api/rate-limits.html): Request quotas, headers, and backoff strategies
- [Webhooks](https://wtd-quillship-demo.github.io/quillship-docs/docs/webhooks.html): Event subscriptions and payload format
- [Python SDK](https://wtd-quillship-demo.github.io/quillship-docs/docs/sdks/python.html): Official Python client library
- [JavaScript SDK](https://wtd-quillship-demo.github.io/quillship-docs/docs/sdks/javascript.html): Official JavaScript/Node.js client library
- [Quickstart: React](https://wtd-quillship-demo.github.io/quillship-docs/docs/guides/quickstart-react.html): Fetch and render content in a React app
- [Migrating from WordPress](https://wtd-quillship-demo.github.io/quillship-docs/docs/guides/migrate-from-wordpress.html): Step-by-step migration guide
- [Content Model](https://wtd-quillship-demo.github.io/quillship-docs/docs/concepts/content-model.html): Content types, fields, and relationships
- [Deployment](https://wtd-quillship-demo.github.io/quillship-docs/docs/ops/deployment.html): Hosting options and environment configuration
- [CLI Reference](https://wtd-quillship-demo.github.io/quillship-docs/docs/reference/cli.html): Command-line tool flags and subcommands
- [Glossary](https://wtd-quillship-demo.github.io/quillship-docs/docs/reference/glossary.html): Key terms and definitions
- [FAQ](https://wtd-quillship-demo.github.io/quillship-docs/docs/faq.html): Frequently asked questions
